title: T-001 — Drizzle schema: suppliers + supplier_products
prompt:
Add Drizzle ORM table definitions for `suppliers` and `supplier_products` per PRD §5.2 + §5.3.

Deliverable: TypeScript schema file under `src/db/schema/planning/suppliers.ts` exporting Drizzle pgTable definitions, including all columns from PRD §5.2 (id UUID PK, tenant_id, site_id, code, name, address_line1/2, city, postal_code, country CHAR(2), contact_name/email/phone, currency CHAR(3), tax_code_id, payment_terms, d365_supplier_id, d365_sync_status enum, d365_last_synced_at, notes, is_active, ext_jsonb, schema_version, audit cols) and §5.3 supplier_products (id, tenant_id, supplier_id FK, product_id FK, is_default, supplier_product_code, lead_time_days, unit_price, currency, moq, order_multiple, last_purchase_date, last_purchase_price, notes, audit). Include indexes per §5.2 and the partial-unique index `supplier_products_default_per_product_unique` on (tenant_id, product_id) WHERE is_default = true. Generate migration `0001_planning_suppliers.sql` via `pnpm drizzle-kit generate`.

RED test: schema-shape test under `src/db/schema/planning/__tests__/suppliers.test.ts` asserting both tables export expected column names + the partial-unique index name appears in the generated SQL. The test must fail before implementation.

Do NOT touch unrelated migration files. Do NOT seed data. Do NOT create API endpoints — that is T-005.

Close-out: paste the generated migration filename + `pnpm vitest run src/db/schema/planning/__tests__/suppliers.test.ts` output.

pipeline_inputs.description: Drizzle pgTable definitions for suppliers + supplier_products with partial-unique is_default index.
pipeline_inputs.details: Tables per PRD §5.2 + §5.3. Use Drizzle pgEnum for d365_sync_status ('synced'|'drift'|'manual'|'conflict'). All FKs reference 03-TECHNICAL items (product_id) and 02-SETTINGS tax_code (tax_code_id) — declare as `uuid()` columns with deferred FK constraints documented in JSDoc comment. Include GIN index on ext_jsonb. Generate migration with `pnpm drizzle-kit generate`. Do NOT modify other module schemas.
acceptance_criteria: Given the schema file is loaded, when introspected, then `suppliers` and `supplier_products` are exported with all columns named in PRD §5.2/§5.3.
Given the migration is generated, when grepped, then it contains a partial-unique index on (tenant_id, product_id) WHERE is_default = true.
Given `pnpm vitest run src/db/schema/planning/__tests__/suppliers.test.ts` runs, when implementation is complete, then 0 failures.
Given `pnpm tsc --noEmit`, when the file is included, then no TypeScript errors are emitted.
test_strategy: Add failing RED test before implementation in src/db/schema/planning/__tests__/suppliers.test.ts.
risk_red_lines: Do not modify schemas of other modules (01-NPD, 02-SETTINGS, 03-TECHNICAL, 05-WAREHOUSE).
Do not skip the partial-unique index — V-PLAN-PO-002 depends on it.
Do not commit secrets or .env values.
